name: Oil & Gas
description: Upstream, midstream, and downstream operations across onshore and offshore facilities. Major hazard HSE management, process safety, PTW, SIMOPS, emergency response, and contractor management in some of the world’s most challenging environments.

name: Construction
description: Civil, structural, MEP, and major infrastructure projects. CDM compliance, site safety plans, subcontractor management, permit-to-work systems, and safety culture programs for project leadership teams across residential, commercial, and infrastructure.

name: Manufacturing
description: Process manufacturing, FMCG, automotive, chemical, and pharmaceutical plants. Machine guarding, COSHH, LOLER/PUWER compliance, ISO 45001 implementation, and comprehensive safety management system development for complex production environments.

name: Healthcare
description: Hospitals, clinics, and healthcare facilities. Manual handling, infection control integration, lone worker safety, RIDDOR compliance, fire risk assessments, and CQC-aligned safety management systems for NHS trusts and private healthcare organisations.

name: Logistics & Transport
description: Road, rail, aviation, and maritime freight. Driver safety programs, fatigue management, dangerous goods (ADR/IATA), loading dock risk management, fleet safety, and HSQE management systems for complex multi-modal supply chains.

name: Government & Public Sector
description: Local authorities, government agencies, utilities, and public infrastructure. Statutory compliance, asbestos management, workplace stress, public liability risk, procurement HSE standards, and regulatory reporting for accountability-driven organisations.

name: Utilities & Energy
description: Power generation, renewable energy, water utilities, and distribution networks. Electrical safety, confined space, working at height, environmental compliance, and ISO 45001/14001/50001 integrated management systems.

name: Mining & Extractives
description: Surface and underground mining operations. Major hazard risk management, ground control, ventilation, explosive safety, emergency response, and regulatory compliance across global jurisdictions from West Africa to Central Asia.

name: Aviation & Hospitality
description: Airport ground handling, MRO facilities, and hospitality environments. SMS (Safety Management Systems), IATA ISAGO, food safety integration, lone working, and security interface — safety cultures built around service excellence.
